text: //26, :49 PM Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under APNFUSCST Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under the Agricultural Assistance Program for Farmers Other than Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes STATE 🎯 Farmer 🎯 Tribal 🎯 Housing Overview Eligibility Benefits How to Apply References Details This scheme offers financial assistance to farmers from non-SC/ST categories to support the purchase of Nano Fertilizers, aiming to enhance agricultural productivity and uplift the standard of living of farmers in Gujarat. About This Scheme The scheme "Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under the Agricultural Assistance Program for Farmers Other than Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to provide financial aid to non-SC/ST farmers in Gujarat to help them purchase Nano Fertilizers. By encouraging the use of efficient and innovative agricultural inputs, the scheme strives to boost farm productivity, improve crop yields, and raise the overall economic well-being of farmers. Benefits Up to 50% of the purchased price per hectare or ₹750/- (within maximum limit of hectares per account. https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/apnfuscst/ /
source: Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under t.pdf

text: //26, :49 PM Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under Eligibility Criteria The applicant must be farmer. The applicant must belong to the General category (.., not SC or ST). The applicant must be resident of Gujarat. Application Process Apply Online Step : The applicant may visit and apply online at -Khedut Portal: https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/ Step : On the home page, click on ‘Schemes’ and then click on ‘Agricultural Schemes’. Step : Now select the scheme, click on the ‘Apply’ button and an application page will open. Step : Click on "Apply New" button and submit new application. Step : Click on the "Update Application" button to add corrections to the application. Step : Once the application is done, confirm it. Step : Take print out of the confirmed application. Step : Applicant can also check their Application Status/View/Print/Upload Application details from the below link: https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/public/frm_Applicant_Corner.aspx https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/apnfuscst/ /
source: Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under t.pdf
